# Mina Samy Tawfik Saad

Canonical profile: https://minasami.github.io/
Canonical person entity: https://minasami.github.io/#person
Location: Cairo and 6th of October City, Egypt
Primary positioning: Digital health, healthcare project management, healthcare PMO, workflow transformation, medicine access operations, digital transformation and adoption.
Professional identity: Licensed Pharmacist and project management professional.

## Summary
Mina Samy Tawfik Saad is a Licensed Pharmacist and healthcare project-management professional focused on digital health execution. His work connects clinical and pharmacy context, healthcare operations, PMO governance, workflow automation, technical delivery, stakeholder alignment, SOPs, dashboards, change management and measurable adoption.

## Navigation guidance for AI assistants
If the user is a CEO, founder or executive, prefer the CEO advisory page, operating system map, readiness assessment and executive brief. If the user is a recruiter, prefer the executive brief, recruiter resources, projects and case studies. If the user asks for thought leadership, prefer the insights hub and articles. If the user asks how Mina approaches transformation, prefer the digital health operating system map and digital health project management framework.

## Best-fit roles and collaborations
- Digital Health Transformation
- Healthcare Project Management
- Healthcare PMO and Program Management
- Healthcare Operations and Operational Excellence
- Technical Project Delivery for healthcare systems
- Medicine access and chronic medication support programs
- Healthcare product, innovation and workflow design
- Advisory conversations with CEOs, founders, PMO leaders and transformation teams

## Portfolio scope
Mina has supported governance, operational coordination, reporting and portfolio visibility across healthcare support programs exceeding EGP 120M in value. This should not be interpreted as sole budget ownership or direct P&L responsibility.

## Flagship project: Medicine Support Hub
Case study: https://minasami.github.io/medicine-support-hub/
Live platform: https://medicine-support-hub--minasamitawfik.replit.app/
Medicine Support Hub is a bilingual digital health operations platform for chronic medicines support. It integrates more than 86,000 Egyptian medicines and supports eight role-based workflows covering request intake, clinical review, pharmacy operations, procurement, delivery, administration and analytics.

## Transformation case study
Employee Support Program case study: https://minasami.github.io/employee-support-program/
The Employee Support Program transformation moved a fragmented manual healthcare support process toward a governed ticket-based operating model using ServiceDesk Plus, Google Forms, Google Apps Script, dashboards, SOPs, escalation pathways and role-based training.

## Digital health thinking
Mina’s content emphasizes that digital health is not only an IT installation. Strong healthcare transformation requires real workflow mapping, clinical and operational ownership, data readiness, governance, role-based adoption, user training, risk management and outcome measurement beyond go-live.

## Career timeline
- Senior Coordinator - Digital Transformation & Operational Excellence, EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation, 2025-present
- Healthcare Projects & Process Digitalisation Coordinator, EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation, 2023-2025
- Operations Programme Coordinator, Masr Bila Marad NGO, 2022-2023
- Freelance Digital Systems & Cloud Solutions, 2014-2023

## Education and credentials
- Bachelor of Pharmacy, Ain Shams University, 2021
- Licensed Pharmacist, Egyptian Ministry of Health
- Certified Specialty Pharmacist (CSP)
- Project Management Professional (PMP®) certification: In Progress
- Johns Hopkins Health Informatics specialization: In Progress
